verification_questions.question: Does `format.md` no longer contain the string `backlog:<marker>` anywhere?
Do the notice-line grammar examples in format.md use slug-style identifiers (no `.md` extensions, no backtick-prefixed paths)?
Are the notice-line example slug identifiers consistent in style with how `next.md` documents them (kebab-case, no file extension)?
Does any other file in `plugins/base/` still use `backlog:<marker>` (not as a legacy detection target) or anchor-path style dispatch examples?
Is the fix minimal — limited only to the two stale references, with no unrelated changes?

fix.description: Replaced backlog:<marker> with backlog:<slug> on line 449; replaced .md-suffixed anchor-path examples on lines 470-473 with kebab-case slug examples

review_rounds.reviewer_notes: All VQs passed. Codex adversarial review: no material findings.
